task: Compare Apple watches and  learn more about the ultra version on apple.
final_result_response:
I now have all the information needed. Let me present a comprehensive, well-structured summary.


## ✅ Apple Watch Comparison + Apple Watch Ultra 3 Deep Dive

I navigated to Apple.com, visited the [Apple Watch Compare page](https://www.apple.com/watch/compare/) and the [Apple Watch Ultra 3 page](https://www.apple.com/apple-watch-ultra-3/). Here's the full breakdown:

---

## 🆚 Apple Watch Model Comparison (2025 Lineup)

| Feature | **Apple Watch Series 11** | **Apple Watch SE 3** | **Apple Watch Ultra 3** |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Starting Price** | From **$399** (GPS) / $499 (Cellular) | From **$249** (GPS) / $299 (Cellular) | From **$799** (GPS + Cellular) |
| **Case Size** | 46mm or 42mm | 44mm or 40mm | 49mm |
| **Case Material** | Aluminum or Titanium | Aluminum only | Aerospace-grade Titanium |
| **Display Type** | Always-On Retina, Wide-angle OLED | Always-On Retina OLED | Always-On Retina, Wide-angle OLED |
| **Brightness** | Up to **2,000 nits** | Up to **1,000 nits** | Up to **3,000 nits** 🏆 |
| **Display Tech** | LTPO3 | LTPO | LTPO3 |
| **Chip** | S10 | S10 | S10 |
| **Battery Life** | Up to **24 hrs** / 38 hrs LPM | Up to **18 hrs** / 32 hrs LPM | Up to **42 hrs** / 72 hrs LPM 🏆 |
| **Fast Charge** | 0–80% in ~30 min | 0–80% in ~45 min | 15 min = 12 hrs use 🏆 |
| **Water Resistance** | 50m (Swim, Snorkel) | 50m (Swim) | **100m** (Scuba, High-Speed Water Sports) 🏆 |
| **Depth Gauge** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ Up to 40m |
| **Water Temp Sensor** | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **GPS** | Precision Dual-Frequency | Standard GPS | Precision Dual-Frequency 🏆 |
| **5G** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Satellite Comms** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ (Emergency SOS + Messages + Find My) 🏆 |
| **ECG App** | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Blood Oxygen App** | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Hypertension Notifications** | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Sleep Apnea Notifications** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Sleep Score** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Crash Detection** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Fall Detection** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Siren** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ (audible up to 600 feet) 🏆 |
| **Action Button** | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Double Tap Gesture** | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Wrist Flick Gesture** | ✅ | ❌ | ✅ |
| **On-device Siri** | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| **Available Finishes** | 7 finishes (Jet Black, Rose Gold, Silver, Space Gray Aluminum + Natural, Gold, Slate Titanium) | 2 finishes (Midnight, Starlight) | 2 finishes (Natural Titanium, Black Titanium) |

---

## 🏔️ Apple Watch Ultra 3 — Deep Dive

### 🎨 Design
- **49mm** aerospace-grade titanium case in **Natural** or **Black**
- Sapphire crystal display (one of the strongest naturally occurring materials)
- Rugged, built for extreme environments
- IP6X dust resistant + WR100 (recreational scuba to 40 meters)

### 🔋 Battery
- Up to **42 hours** normal use
- Up to **72 hours** in Low Power Mode
- Up to **60 hours** outdoor workout (full GPS + heart rate)
- **Fast charge:** 15 minutes = up to 12 hours of use

### 📡 Satellite Communications (NEW in Ultra 3)
- **Emergency SOS via satellite** — no cellular or Wi-Fi needed
- **Messages via satellite** — send/receive texts, emoji, iMessage, or SMS
- **Find My via satellite** — share your location with friends & family

### 🏃 Running & Sports
- **Precision dual-frequency GPS** (best in any sports watch)
- Advanced metrics: running power, cadence, VO2 max estimate
- **Training Load** tracking — balances effort over time
- **Heart Rate Zones** — auto-calculated and personalized
- **Race Route & Pacer** — race against your best/last time
- **Workout Buddy** (with Apple Intelligence from nearby iPhone)
- **Custom Workouts** with Up Next view for intervals
- **Master Multisport Workout** — auto-detects swim → bike → run transitions
- Strava integration with Live Segments

### 🤿 Diving & Outdoors
- Full dive computer via **Oceanic+ app** (Bühlmann decompression algorithm)
- Depth gauge up to **40 meters**
- **Backtrack** — retraces your GPS steps when off-grid
- Custom hiking routes, offline maps, waypoints via Compass app
- **Tides app** — 7 days of tide info for 115,000+ beaches

### 🚴 Cycling
- Power Zones via external power meter + FTP estimation
- Live Activity on iPhone when cycling
- Workout Views for speed, heart rate, elevation

### ❤️ Health
- **Hypertension notifications** — detects patterns of high blood pressure using 30-day optical sensor analysis (validated with 100,000+ participants)
- **ECG app** — single-lead electrocardiogram, shareable with providers
- **Sleep Score** — nightly classification based on duration, consistency, wake-ups, and sleep stages
- **Sleep Apnea notifications** — monitors breathing disturbances
- **Vitals app** — tracks heart rate, respiratory rate, wrist temperature, and sleep duration vs. your personal baseline
- **Blood Oxygen app**, irregular rhythm notifications, low cardio fitness alerts

### 🆘 Safety
- **Emergency SOS via satellite** (Ultra 3 exclusive)
- **Fall Detection** + **Crash Detection**
- **Check In** — notifies contacts when you arrive or finish a workout
- **Siren** — up to 600 feet / 180 meters, activated with Action button
- **Medical ID** accessible by first responders
- **Action Button** — customizable for workouts, flashlight, siren, intervals

### 🔌 Connectivity
- **5G** with new modem + antenna for better weak-signal coverage
- Precision Finding for iPhone
- Standalone calling, music, Apple Pay

---

## 💡 Which Watch is Right for You?
- **Apple Watch SE 3 ($249)** → Best value, essential health & fitness tracking
- **Apple Watch Series 11 ($399)** → Full health suite including ECG, blood oxygen & hypertension notifications for everyday users
- **Apple Watch Ultra 3 ($799)** → The ultimate adventurer/athlete watch — best GPS, longest battery, satellite comms, scuba-capable, and elite sports features

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user asked the agent to compare Apple Watch models and learn more about the Ultra version on Apple's website. Successful completion requires navigating to Apple.com, accessing the Apple Watch comparison page, and gathering detailed information about the Apple Watch Ultra model.

**Output Assessment:** The agent produced a comprehensive, well-structured response including: (1) A full comparison table of Apple Watch Series 11, SE 3, and Ultra 3 covering price, display, battery, water resistance, health features, safety features, and connectivity; (2) A detailed deep-dive into the Apple Watch Ultra 3 covering design, battery, satellite communications, running/sports features, diving/outdoors, cycling, health, safety, and connectivity; (3) A summary recommendation for which watch suits different users.

**Evidence:** Step files confirm the agent navigated to apple.com/watch/compare/ (Step 4), extracted comparison specs for Series 11, SE 3, and Ultra 3 including accurate pricing ($399, $249, $799) and specs (nits, case sizes, LTPO versions) (Steps 3, 5). The agent also navigated to the Apple Watch Ultra 3 product page and extracted detailed information about satellite communications, battery life, water resistance, and health features (Steps 12, 15, 16). All steps returned OK status with no errors. Execution integrity is "healthy". The data in the final response matches what was extracted from the actual Apple.com pages.

**Summary:** The agent successfully navigated Apple.com, accessed the official Apple Watch compare page and the Ultra 3 product page, extracted accurate real-world data, and delivered a comprehensive, well-organized comparison with a detailed Ultra 3 deep dive — fully completing the task as requested.
